items.docs: Creates a new employer entity on Indeed. The employer name is required when creating a new employer. An employer must be created before job postings can be associated with it. Uses the patchEmployer mutation internally.

params.name: employerId
params.description: The unique identifier of the employer.

items.docs: Retrieves the details of an existing employer by their unique identifier.

params.name: employerId
params.description: The unique identifier of the employer to update.

items.docs: Updates an existing employer entity on Indeed. Only the fields included in the request body are modified. The employer name is optional when updating.

info.name: Indeed Register Employer for Candidate Sync

params.name: employerId
params.description: The unique identifier of the employer to register.

items.docs: Registers an employer for Candidate Sync integration, enabling the retrieval of candidate data and disposition synchronization between the ATS and Indeed.

info.name: Indeed List Candidates for an Employer

params.name: employerId
params.description: The unique identifier of the employer.

params.name: status
params.description: Filter candidates by application status.

params.name: jobPostingId
params.description: Filter candidates by job posting ID.

params.name: after
params.description: Cursor for forward pagination.

params.name: first
params.description: Number of candidates to return (max 100).

params.name: since
params.description: Return only candidates who applied after this timestamp.

items.docs: Retrieves a paginated list of candidates who have applied to jobs posted by the specified employer. Part of the Candidate Sync APIs, this endpoint returns candidate and application information including the most recent unacknowledged applications.

params.name: employerId
params.description: The unique identifier of the employer.

params.name: candidateId
params.description: The unique identifier of the candidate application.

items.docs: Retrieves the full details of a specific candidate application, including personal information, resume, screener question responses, and EEO data if applicable.

params.name: employerId
params.description: The unique identifier of the employer.

params.name: candidateId
params.description: The unique identifier of the candidate application.

items.docs: Updates the disposition (application status) of a candidate for a specific job posting. This syncs the hiring pipeline status from the ATS back to Indeed, enabling accurate reporting and analytics.

Creates one or more job postings on Indeed. Requires a job title, description, location, benefits, and job source details. The underlying Indeed API uses the createSourcedJobPostings GraphQL mutation. To update an existing job posting, submit the same jobPostingId and sourceName values that were used at creation time.

params.name: jobPostingId
params.description: The unique identifier of the job posting.

params.name: sourceName
params.description: The source name to scope the job posting lookup. Required when job posting IDs are not globally unique.

items.docs: Retrieves the details of a specific job posting by its unique identifier.

params.name: jobPostingId
params.description: The unique identifier of the job posting to update.

items.docs: Updates an existing job posting on Indeed. The same jobPostingId and sourceName that were used during creation must be provided. Uses the createSourcedJobPostings mutation with updated fields.

params.name: jobPostingId
params.description: The unique identifier of the job posting to expire.

params.name: sourceName
params.description: The source name used when the job posting was created.

items.docs: Expires (closes) a job posting on Indeed, removing it from active search results. This operation cannot be undone; a new job posting must be created to relist the position.

info.name: Indeed List Job Postings for an Employer

params.name: employerId
params.description: The unique identifier of the employer.

params.name: status
params.description: Filter job postings by status.

params.name: after
params.description: Cursor for forward pagination.

params.name: first
params.description: Number of job postings to return (max 100).

items.docs: Retrieves a paginated list of job postings associated with a specific employer.
